endpoints.name: Get status information about the running WeGA-WebApp
endpoints.description: Get status information about the running WeGA-WebApp

endpoints.name: Finds code samples by XML element
endpoints.description: Finds code samples by XML element
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ELEMENT}} with a real element.

endpoints.name: Lists all documents
endpoints.description: The Documents endpoint returns a list of all documents from the WeGA digital edition.

endpoints.name: Finds documents by author
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns a list of documents by a given author – optionally filtered by document type
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{AUTHORID}} with a real authorid.

endpoints.name: Finds documents by date
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns a list of documents related to the given date – optionally filtered by document type.

endpoints.name: Finds documents by reference
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns a list of documents that reference a particular docID – optionally filtered by document type.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DOCID}} with a real docid.

endpoints.name: Returns documents by ID
endpoints.description:
This endpoint returns documents, indicated by an ID.
 Accepted ID formats are WeGA, e.g. A002068 or http://weber-gesamtausgabe.de/A002068, VIAF, e.g. http://viaf.org/viaf/14959938, or  GND, e.g. http://d-nb.info/gnd/118629662
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DOCID}} with a real docid.

endpoints.name: Returns facets
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FACET}} with a real facet.

endpoints.name: Search for a WeGA entity
endpoints.description: This endpoint returns the search results for an entity's name or title.
